The API base URL. Use `https://api.posti: The API base URL. Use `https://api.postiz.com/public/v1` for Postiz Cloud, or `https://your-domain.com/api/public/v1` for self-hosted instances.

To get your API key:
1. Log in to your Postiz dashboard
2. Go to **Settings > Developers > Public API**
3. Generate a new API key and copy it
